description: Textream is a free macOS teleprompter app for streamers, interviewers, and presenters. It highlights your script in real-time as you speak, displayed in a beautiful Dynamic Island overlay.
让 Claude Science 的推理走自选的第三方 API（DeepSeek / 通义千问 / 任意 OpenAI 兼容端点），保留工具调用·Skill·MCP·代码执行，含本地虚拟登录跳过。macOS 菜单栏 app。仅供个人学习研究，使用者自负风险。

A Claude Code skill for coordinating agent work based on a Royal Navy themed framework. It provides structured sailing orders, battle plans, action stations, and a captain's log to manage complex tasks; from single-session work through to parallel subagent squadrons.
A simulation and execution script for tracking top wallet trades on PumpFun and analyzing profit opportunities with AI modeling.
Score and choose the best domain name for your startup — AI-powered generation, real-time availability, and multi-dimensional scoring (LEN, PRO, MEM, BRD, FIT). Free, no signup.
🚀 200倍速！AI时代的下载神器 | Docker/PyPI/HuggingFace/CRAN 全加速 | 并行分片+智能缓存，让下载飞起来
Official codebase for Causal Forcing: Autoregressive Diffusion Distillation Done Right for High-Quality Real-Time Interactive Video Generation
Headless Binary Ninja MCP server — giving AI agents deep reverse-engineering capabilities via 180 tools.
htop for your Claude Code sessions — real-time cost, cache efficiency, model comparison, and smart alerts
Phoenix is a high-performance, resilient tunneling tool designed to bypass DPI and severe network censorship using HTTP/2 (h2/h2c) multiplexing.
Smart LLM router — save 78% on inference costs. 30+ models, one wallet, x402 micropayments.
alg0.dev is an interactive algorithm visualizer where classic algorithms come to life through step by step animations, controls to pause or advance, and access to the underlying code.
KslDump — Why bring your own knife when Defender already left one in the kitchen?
Accessible UI component library. Best performance out of the box. HTML first, React supported.
RynnBrain: Open Embodied Foundation Models
TinyClaw is a tiny wrapper of Claude Code that acts as your 24/7 personal assistant
Allow your 🦞 bot to Shout, Speak, with human vibe
Visual image processing pipeline editor

AI-powered macOS trading script for Polymarket. Automatically analyzes markets, generates intelligent trade decisions, and executes orders using configurable risk management and strategy parameters. One-command installation, lightweight setup, and optimized performance for automated prediction market trading.
Always on. Always local. Always listening. A personal AI assistant that lives on your devices and meets you on every surface you already use.
